pkgmetadata.longdescription: Performance audit, auto-tuning, and validation suite for Gentoo hypervisors and Linux host systems. Audits ZFS, Docker, libvirt, network, kernel sysctl, NFS, block devices, NVIDIA GPUs, K8s, and more via pluggable validator modules. Supports Prometheus metrics export, persistent fixes with dry-run preview, and Do-No-Harm auto-validate via Welch's t-test statistical regression detection.
